title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
